title: pilosella iserana
intro: Pilosella iserana is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Pilosella iserana can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
